justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's temporal requests throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and then asked the user to pick a new time, without offering any alternative options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent repeatedly asked the user to try a different time or day, leading to a very long and unproductive conversation due to the lack of available slots.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the repetitive nature of the agent's responses and its inability to proactively suggest available times, leading to 12 turns of the user trying to find a slot.

judge_scores.overall_notes: The agent's inability to proactively suggest available times when the requested slots were unavailable led to a very poor user experience and a lengthy, unproductive conversation.
